previous_campaign_summary: Web Vitals RUM, Event tracking, Faceted search, Bulk photo ops, Audit log, Chat markdown, E2E tests, Offline gallery, Map enhancements, Lightbox keyboard, Gallery virtualization.
theme: Performance analytics, vendor code-splitting, advanced admin tools, offline-first PWA, deep accessibility, TypeScript strictness

objective_registry.objective: Lazy-load framer-motion in PageTransition and PhotoMap
Advanced admin search with album/featured filters and keyboard shortcuts
Offline-first booking form with IndexedDB persistence
PWA push notifications for bookings, new photos, and announcements
Deep accessibility audit with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance fixes
User preference persistence (theme, language, favorites sync across devices)
Map UX improvements with better clustering, popup styling, and location-based filtering
Admin dashboard analytics with activity trend chart
Remove unused imports to improve type safety and bundle size

phases.objective: Performance analytics dashboard with interactive charts
Code-split heavy vendors (gsap, motion, face-api) to reduce initial bundle

Map UX improvements with better clustering, popup styling, and location-based filtering

Admin dashboard analytics with activity charts and user management
TypeScript strict mode audit and type safety improvements
